title: Bonafousia muelleriana
intro: Bonafousia muelleriana is a plant species, also known as Bonafousia, a flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against various diseases and improve overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Bonafousia muelleriana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, such as 5,6-dihydro-8-hydroxy-1-methyl-1H-2-benzazepine and quercetin. Traditionally, Bonafousia is used in herbal medicine and is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
